title: Bang Boom Bang - Ein todsicheres Ding
original_title: Bang Boom Bang - Ein todsicheres Ding
overview: Bank robber Kalle Grabowski escapes from prison while his unemployed smalltime crook buddy is sitting around doing nothing after he just lost all their money. A fast paced comedy from German director Peter Thorwarth.
